summary: Gap-fill from alpha findings — personal routing, UI prompt guard, env null repair, identity battery probe

steps.title: Remove Lumin name from product-build markers; guard identity intent
steps.on_block: HALT: return to ARC with the blocking gap; builder must not invent classifier markers.
intent_sources: FOUNDER_PACKET.md#problem (P1 #2: word Lumin triggered product-build markers)
steps.required_outcome: Identity questions must not route to product-build markers because the word Lumin appears; identity intent is guarded.
steps.interface_contract: Preserves exported classifier surface consumed by services/chair-lumin-unified.js and services/chair-native-facts.js.

steps.title: Skip strategic brief on personal_turn
steps.on_block: HALT: return to ARC with the blocking gap; builder must not invent brief-skip logic.
intent_sources: FOUNDER_PACKET.md#problem (P2 #4: strategic brief appended on personal turns)
steps.required_outcome: On a personal_turn the strategic brief section is not appended.
steps.interface_contract: Consumes personal_turn signal from services/chair-context-classifier.js; unified chair response contract unchanged.

steps.title: Preserve personal_turn on identity asks; skip Point B attach
steps.on_block: HALT: return to ARC with the blocking gap; builder must not invent Point B attach rules.
intent_sources: FOUNDER_PACKET.md#problem (P1: identity asks routed Point B content)
steps.required_outcome: Identity asks keep personal_turn and do not attach Point B content.
steps.interface_contract: Uses isFounderIdentityIntent from services/founder-life-admin-intent.js; native-facts response contract unchanged.

steps.title: Export isFounderIdentityIntent helper
steps.on_block: HALT: return to ARC with the blocking gap; builder must not invent the helper signature.
steps.required_outcome: Module exports isFounderIdentityIntent for identity-ask detection.
steps.interface_contract: Adds named export isFounderIdentityIntent consumed by services/chair-native-facts.js.

steps.title: Alpha battery identity twin probe
steps.on_block: HALT: return to ARC with the blocking gap; builder must not invent probe assertions.
steps.required_outcome: Alpha battery includes probe Q_identity_twin that fails on strategic dump language.
steps.interface_contract: Acceptance runner invoked by npm run lifeos:founder-chat:alpha:battery; probe id Q_identity_twin.

steps.title: Boot seeder overwrites literal null emails
steps.on_block: HALT: return to ARC with the blocking gap; builder must not write server.js (protected composition root).
steps.protected_file_note: Original blueprint targeted server.js. server.js is now a 48-line composition root (runtime-lane selector) and MUST NOT be written by a lower-tier builder. The boot-seeder null-email repair lives in server-full-runtime.js (GMAIL_SIGNUP_EMAIL seeded default). Step re-pointed to server-full-runtime.js to match current reality; server.js stays protected and out of the write sandbox.
intent_sources: FOUNDER_PACKET.md#problem (P1 #3: GMAIL_SIGNUP_EMAIL literal null blocked provisioning)
steps.required_outcome: Boot seeder overwrites a literal null GMAIL_SIGNUP_EMAIL with a valid system signup email so alpha-auditor provisioning is not blocked.
steps.interface_contract: Boot seeder runs inside server-full-runtime.js startup; server.js composition root is unchanged and remains protected.

steps.title: Alpha auditor provision cred diagnosis
steps.on_block: HALT: return to ARC with the blocking gap; builder must not invent provisioning diagnosis logic.
steps.required_outcome: Alpha-auditor provisioning surfaces a credential diagnosis instead of failing silently on missing/null email env.
steps.interface_contract: Auth route module registered by the runtime route registrar; provisioning diagnosis exposed on the alpha-auditor path.

arc_repair_note: ARC repair 2026-07-01: added executable step contracts (action_type, sandbox_boundary, authority_owner, on_block, intent_sources) and byte_exact_copy CONTENT snapshots so a lower-tier builder can reproduce each target file deterministically without inventing product intent. Snapshots are the current committed (git_sha 69dbd11) known-good files. LFA-S06 re-pointed from protected server.js to server-full-runtime.js where the boot seeder actually lives.
